name: Chicken Cacciatoria
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub chicken with minced garlic.
2. Combine flour, 1 tsp salt, and pepper in a large paper bag; shake chicken pieces until coated.
3. Heat oil in a Dutch oven.
4. Brown chicken in batches on all sides; drain on absorbent paper.
5. Pour off any remaining oil from the pan.
6. Return chicken to the Dutch oven.
7. Add garlic, tomatoes, tomato paste, onions, sugar, 1 tsp salt, and bay leaf.
8. Cover and baste occasionally with sauce from the pan.
9. Simmer until chicken is tender, about 1 hour.
10. Serves 4
